SHBG Blood Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/shbg-blood-test/ 
SHBG Blood Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an SHBG blood test? 
An SHBG blood test measures the level of a protein called sex hormone binding globulin (SHBG) in a sample of your blood. SHBG is made mostly in your liver. It binds (attaches) to sex hormones Â such as testosterone and estrogen and helps control how much of these hormones are active in your body.
All of the sex hormones in your blood are either bound to protein
